creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
I'm unable to reproduce in 13.0 and 14-CURRENT jails.

http://pkg.ftfl.ca/data/13amd64-default/2022-03-30_22h42m30s/logs/emacs-devel-29.0.50.20220315_1,2.log

http://pkg.ftfl.ca/data/14amd64-default/2022-03-30_23h08m15s/logs/emacs-devel-29.0.50.20220315_1,2.log

I notice that you are using an older commit (0470ef0) from the emacs master branch that was part of the 2022-02-28 update.  Could you update your ports tree to pull in the 2022-03-15 update and try again?  BTW, I'm going to do the next editors/emacs-devel update tomorrow, so you could also wait about about a day.
